trivia_bullets.text: White Creature — Cat uncommon (MKM, no. 16, February 9, 2024), illustrated by Ilse Gort. 'Forum' references Ravnica's civic architecture (Boros/Senate public forums); the cat haunts institutional corridors.

Disguise {1}{W}: cast face down as 2/2 with ward {2}, turn face up to bounce a permanent you control to hand and place a +1/+1 counter on self. Bounce-on-reveal is flexible tempo: protects threatened permanent while buffing the Familiar.

Tonal opposite of Culvert Ambusher (158): where the Ambusher's reveal is a predator lunge, Forum Familiar's reveal is a sleight-of-hand bounce — comedic relief within MKM's noir-murder-mystery aesthetic.
No flavor text on record for this card.

related_cards.note: shares Disguise mechanic; BBL disguise symbol node; tonal opposite
